/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.1.0 -o libluxaccel.0.1.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libluxaccel.0.dylib CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/ml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/zk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/lattice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/fhe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/dex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luxaccel.dir/src/c_api.cpp.o  /Users/z/work/luxcpp/install/lib/liblux_gpu_core.a
